Help reduce the stigma behind dementia
What does dementia look like? A friend. A family member. A neighbour. Dementia might look different than you expect. Learn more at Canada.ca/dementia
What does dementia look like?
A friend. A family member. A neighbour.
Dementia might look different than you expect. Learn more at Canada.ca/dementia
What does dementia look like? – image
Platform / Post text
Facebook Almost 60% of Canadians believe that if they were diagnosed with dementia, those around them would treat them differently. Each person's experience of dementia is unique – as well, symptoms often differ by day and by setting. Some people can remain active and independent for years after symptoms begin. We can all help reduce stigma by taking steps to make our communities more dementia-inclusive at http://ow.ly/nRJX50IqCOb
